creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #11)
I agree that we can close it, as we have the schema in the Makefile, and it should get installed & compiled automatically when installing / uninstalling the port.
I'm not sure what went wrong when you installed / upgraded it (given that you have an old version, I assume it was upgraded).
If you still remember how you installed it and if anything unexpected happened during the install / upgrade, maybe we can dig deeper to find an explanation. For example, maybe there was an unclean shutdown / power loss, and the compiled schema was not flushed into the disk? Otherwise, we can just close it.
